Qualified & Committed

A New Chapter. The Same Work Ethic.

After a very long wait and a lot of hard work, the certificates have finally come through and the journey to becoming a fully qualified personal trainer is complete. But this is only the beginning.

JT Personal Training is built on constant progress, better coaching, and giving every client the best possible experience. The goal is simple: help you build life-changing habits, train with intent, and keep moving forward.

  • ✓CIMSPA member and professionally accredited personal trainer
  • ✓Personalised sessions built around your goals, pace and ability
  • ✓Focused on strength, fat loss, mobility, confidence and long-term results
  • ✓Private gym floor access with all fitness levels welcome
What You Can Work On

Services Offered

Whether you want to get stronger, improve fitness, lose body fat, move better or sharpen up your boxing, JT Personal Training offers coaching built around real progress.

🥊

Boxing Coaching

Improve fitness, conditioning, coordination, confidence and power with boxing-based sessions that challenge the whole body.

🏋️

Strength Work

Build a stronger body with structured, progressive training that helps you develop power, technique and consistency.

🔥

Fat Loss

Follow a more sustainable plan with training that supports healthier habits, improved energy and visible progress.

🤸

Mobility

Move better, feel better and train with less restriction through mobility work that supports everyday strength and performance.

🎯

1-to-1 Coaching

Personalised training tailored to your goals, whether you are just starting out, rebuilding confidence, or aiming for your next level.

📈

6 & 12 Week Programmes

Structured transformation plans designed to help you build momentum, stay accountable and get results you can actually track.
